pi_items.source: Task description implicitly requires saving as Customer_Segmentation.dva.
Task description specifies C:\Users\Docker\Documents\ as the save location.
Task description requires adding Clusters to the chart.
Task description specifies visualizing Sales vs Profit for each Customer Name. The dataset sample_order_lines2023.xlsx contains all three columns.
Task description specifies creating exactly 5 clusters.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses the synthetic Sample Order Lines dataset (sample_order_lines2023.xlsx), which contains 9,000 rows. The data includes exactly 2,683 unique customers (Customer Name), resulting in a high-density scatter plot with 2,683 individual data points representing Sales vs Profit. The task requires configuring exactly 5 clusters via the Analytics pane, so the dots should visually be partitioned into 5 distinct groups/colors. The resulting workbook must be saved as Customer_Segmentation.dva in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\.
